roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.summary: Bridges development and operations to automate, deploy, and maintain reliable software systems.
responsibilities: Collaborate with developers on release workflows

roadmap.title: Junior DevOps Engineer
roadmap.focus: Learn Linux, Git, scripting, and cloud basics

roadmap.title: DevOps Engineer
roadmap.focus: Build CI/CD pipelines and manage containerized workloads

roadmap.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
roadmap.focus: Architect infrastructure, implement IaC, and optimize reliability

roadmap.title: DevOps Lead / Architect
roadmap.focus: Design platform strategy and mentor teams

roadmap.title: Principal DevOps / Platform Director
roadmap.focus: Drive engineering efficiency and cloud strategy

interactions.description: Enable fast, reliable deployments and resolve environment issues
Integrate security scanning and compliance into pipelines
Provide runbooks and infrastructure context for incidents
Align release schedules with infrastructure capacity

bestPractices: Manage infrastructure as code for all environments

resources.title: DevOps Roadmap
resources.description: Interactive guide to DevOps skills and career progression

resources.title: The Phoenix Project
resources.description: Classic book on DevOps principles and lean IT

resources.title: AWS DevOps Blog
resources.description: Best practices and updates for AWS DevOps practitioners

resources.title: Terraform Tutorials
resources.description: Hands-on lessons for infrastructure as code

roles.title: Security Engineer
roles.summary: Protects systems, networks, and data by designing and operating defensive security controls.
responsibilities: Conduct security reviews of code and infrastructure

roadmap.title: Junior Security Engineer
roadmap.focus: Learn networking, operating systems, and security fundamentals

roadmap.title: Security Engineer
roadmap.focus: Operate SIEM, conduct vulnerability scans, and respond to alerts

roadmap.title: Senior Security Engineer
roadmap.focus: Design security controls and lead incident response

roadmap.title: Security Architect / Lead
roadmap.focus: Architect enterprise security programs and mentor analysts

interactions.description: Embed security controls into CI/CD and cloud infrastructure
Review code and guide secure development practices
Coordinate patching, logging, and network segmentation

bestPractices: Run regular patching and vulnerability scans

resources.title: Cyber Security Roadmap
resources.description: Interactive roadmap for cyber security careers

resources.title: OWASP Top 10
resources.description: Standard awareness document for web application security

resources.title: Cloud Security Engineer Roadmap
resources.description: Step-by-step guide to cloud security engineering

resources.title: SANS Reading Room
resources.description: Whitepapers on security tools, threats, and practices

roles.title: Technical Support / Customer Success Manager
roles.summary: Helps customers adopt the product, resolve issues, and maximize long-term value.
responsibilities: Guide customers through onboarding and adoption
Create knowledge base and training content
Advocate customer needs to product and engineering

roadmap.title: Support Specialist / Associate CSM
roadmap.focus: Learn product, handle tickets, and build customer rapport

roadmap.title: Technical Support Engineer / CSM
roadmap.focus: Solve complex issues and manage a portfolio of accounts

roadmap.title: Senior CSM / Support Lead
roadmap.focus: Lead renewals, adoption strategies, and escalation management

roadmap.title: Customer Success Manager / Support Manager
roadmap.focus: Build success programs and manage a team

roadmap.title: Director of Customer Success / VP Support
roadmap.focus: Own customer lifecycle strategy and revenue retention

interactions.description: Share customer feedback to inform roadmap priorities
Escalate bugs and coordinate technical resolutions
Identify upsell opportunities and align on account plans
Provide testimonials and drive case studies

bestPractices: Respond promptly and set clear expectations
Close the feedback loop with product teams

resources.title: Customer Success Management Guide
resources.description: Comprehensive guide to the CSM role and career

resources.title: HubSpot Academy Inbound Service
resources.description: Free course on modern customer service fundamentals

resources.title: Customer Success Curated Resources
resources.description: Community-curated list of CS articles, books, and tools

resources.title: ChurnZero Blog
resources.description: Articles on CS strategy, skills, and metrics

resources.title: SuccessCOACHING Best Practices
resources.description: Enablement practices for high-performing CS teams
